name: 18" Wood Plant Stand Side Table - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Bring sleek, modern style to your indoor space with this Wood Plant Stand Side Table from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made of solid wood, this urn side table features a round tabletop with a long column and pedestal base for a chic look that blends effortlessly with any decor style and color palette. Place it beside your couch or armchair to hold a planter, vase or decorative items.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
